cookbook_cmd: omitted from standalone kernel task; use bench/workloads.json and docs/captured_kernel_api_shapes.json for RLCR
note: fp8 batched-GEMM op; profiler also attributes some bmm instances generically (peak ~20.7%); this is the dominant non-mamba fp8 bmm.
shape_capture_note: Captured 2026-07-08 on Verda B300 light-face-hides-fin-03-1 from a real nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-FP8 TP=1 SGLang production-path execution in the prepared sglang_bbuf_b300 container; CUDA graph disabled only to keep the temporary shape-capture hook out of graph capture; capture used temporary import/decomposition compatibility shims for the local Torch/Transformers environment, with request windows covering long/short prompt and mid/high concurrency serving paths.
